# L3 — l2-compliance-reporting

## Anchors

- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.ComplianceReportService/GenerateAccessReport`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.ComplianceReportService/GetComplianceReport`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.ComplianceReportService/GetReportDownloadUrl`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.ComplianceReportService/ListComplianceReports`

## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| ComplianceReportService/GenerateAccessReport | (GenerateAccessReportRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /iam/v1/complianceReports:generateAccessReport |
| ComplianceReportService/GetComplianceReport | (GetComplianceReportRequest) → ComplianceReport | GET /iam/v1/complianceReports/{report_id} |
| ComplianceReportService/GetReportDownloadUrl | (GetReportDownloadUrlRequest) → ReportDownloadUrlResponse | POST /iam/v1/complianceReports/{report_id}:getDownloadUrl |
| ComplianceReportService/ListComplianceReports | (ListComplianceReportsRequest) → ListComplianceReportsResponse | GET /iam/v1/complianceReports |

      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.nullableTime` — nullableTime возвращает nil для zero-времени, иначе само значение (для NULL-able колонок).

      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.txAsPgx` — txAsPgx recovers the concrete pgx.Tx from the service layer's opaque transaction handle.

    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/errors.Wrapf` — Wrapf — стандартный fmt.Errorf-style обёртка с явным sentinel.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service.emitAudit` — emitAudit emits an audit event and logs (never drops) a failure.

  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/phase7common.MapErr` — MapErr — domain/iamerr sentinel → gRPC status.

    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/compliance_report.complianceStatusToProto` — complianceStatusToProto маппит domain-статус compliance-отчёта в protobuf-enum Status.

  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service.ComplianceReportService).GetReportDownloadURL` — GetReportDownloadURL issues short-lived presigned GET URLs for a COMPLETED report artifact and its manifest.

      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.S3ReportStore).objectURL` — objectURL builds the request URL for a key.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.S3ReportStore).scheme` — scheme возвращает "http" если endpoint начинается с http://, иначе "https".
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.S3ReportStore).signingKey` — signingKey derives the SigV4 signing key and signs stringToSign.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.encodeCanonicalQuery` — encodeCanonicalQuery URL-encodes query params in sorted order (SigV4).
